title: Bed Bug Treatment in Annadale, Staten Island

We use advanced heat treatment and eco-friendly solutions that are safe for families and pets, backed by our satisfaction guarantee and follow-up inspections.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Annadale?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Annadale typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Annadale homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Annadale homes take 4-8 hours depending on the size of your property and treatment method used. Heat treatments are completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require follow-up visits 2-3 weeks later to ensure complete elimination of all bed bug life stages.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe for families and pets. We use EPA-approved products and heat treatment methods that are non-toxic. For chemical treatments, we recommend a brief 4-6 hour absence during application, after which your home is safe to re-enter.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Annadale?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Annadale. If bed bugs return within the warranty period (typically 30-90 days depending on the treatment), we will re-treat your home at no additional cost. We also provide follow-up inspections to ensure complete elimination.
